---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe it from the user's perspective.

## Proposed solution

How would you like this to work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Which component does this affect?

- [ ] Dashboard server (`dashboard/server.js`)
- [ ] Nightly agent (`scripts/nightly-agent.ps1`)
- [ ] Telegram bot (inside `server.js`)
- [ ] Voice transcription (Whisper.cpp pipeline)
- [ ] Wiki skill files (`wiki/skills/`)
- [ ] CLAUDE.md / documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Screenshots, related issues, or any other context that helps explain the request.
